collection.name: Mint-Chan
collection.description: A mint-colored stick figure who was born in the r/coaxedintoasnafu subreddit before starting her career as the protagonist of the webcomic "Mint-Chan in Colorland". Her color lies somewhere between green and blue, which can be problematic when people don't know how to categorize her.

collection.name: Indigo
collection.description: As a part of the highest frequency amongst visible light, she is in charge of preducting the word of prophet Roy G. Biv to devote to Lady Ultraviolet.

collection.name: Snafu Murder Cleanup Guy
collection.description: When a disaster occurs in the r/coaxedintoasnafu subreddit, someone has to clean it up. It's easy to find this guy using his trusty mop to clean almost anything, from excessive blood to muddy environments.

collection.name: Sixteenth-Note Chan
collection.description: Your average high school character known for starting debates about the ages of characters in fictional media. She has become a recurring figure in the r/coaxedintoasnafu subreddit, appearing in multiple comics and discussions.

collection.name: Murderbeast #10
collection.description: As one of the many monsters that originated from a fantasy ecosystem, this murderous beast only wants to kill. He was once imprisoned in a maximum-security facility, and even then he was able to escape thanks to a small flaw in the security system.

collection.name: Dr. Holocaust
collection.description: The sworn enemy of Snafio, whose goal is to kill him and become the most evil being in existence. Despite this, he still gets invited to friendly go-kart races with Snafio and his friends.

collection.name: Poopenfarden
collection.description: A mysterious being that lurks in the shadows with red eyes and a creepy face. He has teamed up with Dr. Holocaust several times, and he strikes terror into the hearts of the victims he decides to harass.
